head_commits: bc98e12 docs(plan): approval workflow implementation plan
6f8c95c feat(schema): add Booking.rejectionReason for approval workflow
f880593 test: add approval workflow test scaffolding
aaa2aab feat(api): block PATCH /bookings/:id for PENDING_APPROVAL (409)
7e6fb01 feat(web): show PENDING_APPROVAL in /bookings list and filter
78ca6cc feat(web): RejectBookingModal with required reason + Esc-close
bdb8a9d feat(web): approval action buttons + rejection banner on /bookings/[id]
dc708b4 fix(critical): close legacy confirm bypass + approveBooking via confirmBooking + align DRAFT variant + single error in handleReject
a5f9d46 fix(web): wrap BookingHistoryPage in Suspense boundary for useSearchParams

critical: C1 legacy confirm bypass — DRAFT→CONFIRMED via POST /:id/status {action:'confirm'} blocked: allowedActionsByStatus.DRAFT = ['cancel'] + regression test in approval.test.ts
high: H1 DRAFT StatusPill variant aligned with /bookings/[id] ("view" instead of "limited")
H2 statusFilter now seeds from ?status= URL param on mount (useSearchParams + Suspense boundary)
medium: M1 handleReject re-throws only — no duplicate toast.error (modal already surfaces error)
low: L1 PENDING_APPROVAL filter added to bookings list dropdown
L2 Amber info banner shown on /bookings/[id] for PENDING_APPROVAL status

deferred_notes: Stale rejectionReason persists in DB after resubmit cycle but is not surfaced in UI on new PENDING_APPROVAL — only on DRAFT after reject. Acceptable trade-off; consider clearing on CONFIRMED if UX concerns emerge.

critical: C1 approveBooking now delegates to confirmBooking() — restores availability check, unit reservation, estimate snapshot, finance events (recomputeBookingFinance + createFinanceEvent with eventType:'BOOKING_CONFIRMED', via:'approve')
high: H1 ?status= query param validated via Zod bookingStatusEnum — garbage input returns 400 INVALID_STATUS_FILTER
medium: M1 pre-check before confirmBooking delegation uses prisma.booking.findUnique with select:{id,status} to validate PENDING_APPROVAL state (404 + 409 paths)
M2 test coverage increased to 22 integration tests in approval.test.ts including legacy-bypass regression + full reject-resubmit-approve cycle + garbage-status-filter

non_blocker_notes: Audit write for BOOKING_APPROVED happens outside confirmBooking's internal transaction — acceptable (consistent with existing patterns; audit is observability, not a business invariant)
Hardcoded before:{status:'PENDING_APPROVAL'} in audit is brittle but safe given explicit pre-check validates status before confirmBooking runs

rationale: Standard governance — dual reviewers (product lens + technical lens). Codex not available on this host, so technical lens is a second Claude agent (split-focus). Scope: two-stage booking approval. WAREHOUSE creates DRAFT → submits for approval (→ PENDING_APPROVAL) → SUPER_ADMIN approves (→ CONFIRMED, triggers confirmBooking side-effects) or rejects with required reason (→ DRAFT + rejectionReason). All transitions audited; edits blocked during PENDING_APPROVAL. Closes legacy DRAFT→CONFIRMED bypass via /:id/status route.

breakdown.apps_api_other_suites: unchanged (dashboard 15, smoke, barcode, importSession, competitorMatcher, rolesGuard holistic, calendar, finance)

tests.fixture_strategy: Mirrors dashboard.test.ts — isolated SQLite DB via TEST_DB_PATH, prisma db push --force-reset, signSession() tokens for WAREHOUSE/SUPER_ADMIN/TECHNICIAN

gates.build: workspaces build validated by tsc --noEmit on both apps

scope_notes.schema_changes: +1 field: Booking.rejectionReason (String?) — migrated via prisma db push --accept-data-loss in dev; production deploy requires DB backup per project convention
new_api_endpoints: POST /api/bookings/:id/submit-for-approval (SA + WH) — DRAFT → PENDING_APPROVAL; clears previous rejectionReason; writes BOOKING_SUBMITTED audit
POST /api/bookings/:id/approve (SA only) — PENDING_APPROVAL → CONFIRMED via confirmBooking() + finance side-effects + BOOKING_APPROVED audit
POST /api/bookings/:id/reject (SA only) — required non-empty trimmed reason (Zod min(3)), PENDING_APPROVAL → DRAFT; stores rejectionReason; BOOKING_REJECTED audit with reason in after
behaviour_changes: allowedActionsByStatus.DRAFT dropped 'confirm' (closes CRITICAL bypass) + added 'PENDING_APPROVAL: [cancel]' entry
PATCH /api/bookings/:id returns 409 BOOKING_EDIT_FORBIDDEN for PENDING_APPROVAL (protects submitted state from mutation)
GET /api/bookings now accepts ?status=<enum> with Zod validation; invalid value → 400 INVALID_STATUS_FILTER
files_modified: apps/api/src/routes/bookings.ts (3 new endpoints, Zod enum, allowedActionsByStatus, PATCH guard)
apps/web/app/bookings/[id]/page.tsx (approval buttons, rejection banner, PENDING_APPROVAL info banner)
scope_notes.design_canon_compliance: All UI elements use canonical tokens (rose/amber/accent/ink/border/surface). StatusPill variants reused (warn for PENDING_APPROVAL, view for DRAFT). No hex introduced.
scope_notes.middleware_changes: rolesGuard([SUPER_ADMIN, WAREHOUSE]) on submit; rolesGuard([SUPER_ADMIN]) on approve/reject
scope_notes.audit_coverage: BOOKING_SUBMITTED (inside tx) + BOOKING_APPROVED (outside confirmBooking tx; non-blocker acknowledged) + BOOKING_REJECTED (inside tx)

deferred_out_of_scope: Email/Telegram notification to SUPER_ADMIN on new PENDING_APPROVAL — out of scope for workflow sprint; tracked for Subproject D or follow-up
Bulk approve/reject UI for /bookings list — only per-booking actions delivered; bulk actions a future sprint
Approval history timeline on /bookings/[id] — current approach: single latest rejectionReason banner; full audit surfacing via /admin/audit page works today

Clear rejectionReason on CONFIRMED/CANCELLED transitions — current behavior keeps stale value in DB but UI only surfaces it on DRAFT after reject; noted by product reviewer as minor future-sprint note
